Our Story

Not just a
tiffin spot.

"A place to chill, eat well,
and feel something real."

IDLYZZA is where comfort meets craft — where fluffy idlys meet wood-fired pizza, and fresh mojitos meet masala chai. We built this for the late-night souls and the early-morning dreamers.

Every dish is made with love, every corner designed with intention. Come hungry, leave happy.
